title: Create: Dyeable Chains
description: Adds the ability to the dye chains of Create's Chain Conveyors
body:
Create: Dyeable Chains is an addon mod for Create. It allows you to dye the chains on Chain Conveyor by right clicking with a dye item, similar to mechanical belts. You can remove the dye by using a water bucket.

Dyed chains can help a lot when you are working with a lot of Chain Conveyor by providing clarity. (and it also looks cool) 

It will just dye one side of the chain, allowing for the two directions to be dyed in two different colors.

![Chain Conveyors dyed in all colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31dbe3bac11016b96d81268e0e8f1887a9310e48.png)
